raw:
Welcome to my blog!

I'm Rickee, if you know, you know.

---

### The Day Job

- Mainly CNH/USD and HKD/CNH CCS.

- In the off-chance this site actually blows up, industry peers are always welcome to say hi. :-)

### The Fun Stuff

- A lot about music. Classicals? Absolutely. Piano, Choir, A Capella. Favorite composer? Chopin no doubt. Recently I'm wrestling with Op. 25-5 ("Wrong Note"). Blues, Soul, Funk, they all have the excellent vibe and rythmn I can't resist. An passionate improvisor–never had too much Jazz. Also love Ambient and meditation. Hip-Hop is not really my jam though.

- All sorts of outdoor activities. Hiking, sailing, or just a casual jog along the Victoria Harbour. Regularly eating out. Frequent wanderer of supermarkets (let's just call it "outdoor").

- I tend to do things on a whim. This website being Exibit A.

### The Pipe Dreams

- Traveling the world and making friends in every corner of it.

- Find that mythical wfh & wlb work with inner peace, or just build my own things and hit it big someday XD
